name: l2_static_airframe_gameplay_fit_candidate
value: Aerodynamics4McL2StaticAirframeGameplayFitCandidate maps accepted static-airframe coefficient seeds into forward body-drag gameplay-fit candidates without changing runtime physics.
note: Reference surface for coefficient-to-gameplay-fit candidate mapping.

name: l2_static_airframe_coefficient_acceptance_gate
value: Aerodynamics4McL2StaticAirframeCoefficientAcceptanceGate keeps unavailable and test-runtime coefficients blocked before candidate adoption.
note: Reference surface for coefficient-to-gameplay-fit candidate mapping.

name: l2_static_airframe_coefficient_seed
value: Aerodynamics4McL2StaticAirframeCoefficientSeed supplies reference area air density drag sideforce lift moment and pressure-center coefficient seeds.
note: Reference surface for coefficient-to-gameplay-fit candidate mapping.

name: drone_config_body_drag
value: DroneConfig.bodyDragCoefficients supplies the current gameplay Z-axis quadratic body-drag coefficient used for target-to-current comparison.
note: Reference surface for coefficient-to-gameplay-fit candidate mapping.

name: aerodynamics4mc_l2_target
value: Aerodynamics4MC Core is the upstream target for future live multi-axis L2 wind-tunnel coefficient fitting.
note: Reference surface for coefficient-to-gameplay-fit candidate mapping.
